rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S init_module -S finit_module -S delete_module -k modules
rules.note: module ops OR'd (auditctl(8) -S, f3 2.3); LOW-MEDIUM -- modules load mostly at boot (f3 3.5)

rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b32 -S init_module -S finit_module -S delete_module -k modules
rules.note: 32-bit arch pairing (NOT a duplicate; intentional 32+64-bit coverage, catalog #30)

rate_band_basis: f3 3.5/6: module ops are infrequent (boot + occasional runtime) -> LOW-MEDIUM band (1/50/500/day). b64+b32 paired. 1200 B/event (syscall, f3 3.3).
